creator: zi@FreeBSD.org
text:
- /usr/local/bin isn't the right place for it
- unnecessary churn/change

Check out the hier man page:

     /sbin/     system programs and administration utilities fundamental to
                both single-user and multi-user environments

Managing keytabs (regardless of whether it is root or non-root) is certainly a system/administration-related task.  Non-root users are allowed to run things in sbin.
